name: Salad Dressing Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar and cocoa in a bowl until well combined.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the cool water and baking soda until smooth.
3. Add the water and baking soda mixture to the sugar and cocoa mixture, stirring continuously.
4. Gradually add the salad dressing, stirring until all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.
5. Stir in the flour until it is just incorporated into the batter.
6. Finally, stir in the vanilla extract.
7. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 minutes or until set.
